titleStmt.title: SII 37.107: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 107. (A.R. No. 333 of 1938-39.) Bayanapalle, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab in a well in survey No. 251/B.
This is dated Śaka 1772, Sādhāraṇa, Jyēshṭha ba. 5, corresponding to 1850 A.D., June 29, Saturday.

It records a dasavanda gift of land made by four washermen of Chennūru to Rāmasvami for having constructed a well in their inām land at Bayyanapalle with the stipulation that he could give share of water to anybody only after distributing due shares of water to the inamdārs.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1772 Agunēṭi sādhāraṇa nāma saṁvatsara jēṣṭa ba 5 lu . caṁnū
rulōṁ vuṁḍē śrīkākulaṁ pullaṁnna komāruḍu rāmasvāmi bayyanapallegrāmaṁcākala mirāśidā¨rlu Aynicākalagurvi
gāṇi koḍuku Iccināḍu 1 yallugāḍu 1 saṁjīvigāḍu 1 gaṁggaṇakoḍku pedayellugāḍu 1 yī nalgurutmaku maṁggalavāṁḍlu
yeṭṭinimityaṁ māku yiccina yināṁ . sadaru grāmaṁlō tuṁggavāṭicēnu Anē bōḍi yināṁ khuṣki yeṭṭivāṁḍla yināmuku tū .
kōdārlayināmu ku da . cākalavāṁḍlayināmu kunipa . vuppara Āsādi yināmuku vuttaraṁ yī catu¨rdikkulaku
lōgā vuṁḍabaḍina tuṁggapāṭi cēnu naṁ . taraṁ . ḥ yakarālu 3/20 yī yakarālu taramu gala ja
mīnulōnu rāmasvāmi Ayniniṁnnu yī sthaḷaṁlō bāvi tovvistē cātu¨rbhāgaṁ dasamaṁdaṁ yistāmu Ani
ceppinaṁduku bāvi tovviṁci rātikaṭnaṁ kaṭṭiṁcināvu kanuka nīku mēmu Iccivuṁḍē daśamaṁdhaṁ bāvi Ānukoni da
kṣaṇaṁ vaṁpuyakrāluṁ ... 4 mupainālgu kuṁṭalu pātike paraka jamīnu mēmu nalguramunaku yiccināmu .
ganuka yī jamīnu mīṣarāputrapautrapāraṁparyāyaṁ Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigānu khāna Anubhaviṁccukunēdi .
gāka nīku yiccivuṁḍē dasamaṁdāniki mā yināmuku pāraṁggā cikkina nīḷḷu yavvariki yivvaḍānaku
soṁttadāru Ayni nīku nimittamē gāni yināmudā¨rllamu Ayni māku nimittaṁ lēdu . yī jamīnuku
sarakāruku Accejōḍi vagairā yemi tagginā yināṁdā¨rllamu Ayni mēmē Accukōgalavāramugā
ni rāmasvāmi Ayni nīku nimittaṁlēdu . yiṭani vrāyiṁcina śilāśāsanamu .
Digital edition of SII 37.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
